summary: Develop a persuasive proposal aligned to buyer requirements with clear value proposition, scope, and commercial terms.

inputs.name: buyer_requirements
inputs.description: Buyer needs, success criteria, and evaluation criteria.

inputs.name: solution_scope
inputs.description: Proposed solution scope, deliverables, and timeline.

inputs.name: pricing_framework
inputs.description: Pricing model, discount policy, and commercial constraints.

outputs.name: proposal_draft
outputs.description: Complete proposal with executive summary, solution, value, and pricing sections.

outputs.name: value_proposition
outputs.description: Quantified value proposition tied to buyer outcomes.

outputs.name: open_issues
outputs.description: Unresolved questions and assumptions requiring buyer input.

budget.notes: Bias toward buyer-aligned narrative and clear commercial terms.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is proposal development, not legal contract drafting.
Require buyer requirements and solution scope before drafting.
Return proposal draft, value proposition, and open issues in one consistent output.

steps.action: Map buyer requirements to proposal sections.
Draft proposal narrative with executive summary and solution sections.
Validate pricing against policy and present commercial terms clearly.
Compile final proposal with all sections and identify open issues.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read buyer requirements, solution scope, and pricing data.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Save the proposal draft and supporting artifacts.

verification.method: Check that all buyer requirements have corresponding proposal sections.
Check that pricing is presented clearly and transparently.
Check that unresolved questions and assumptions are documented.

success_criteria: The proposal addresses all buyer requirements with specific solutions.
Pricing is clear, transparent, and policy-compliant.
Open issues are documented for buyer discussion.

rollback.when: If the proposal invents buyer requirements or misrepresents capabilities, roll back to source data and rerun.
